You are planning an advisory reader cleanup pass over raw translated Markdown.
Return compact JSON only. Do not rewrite, translate, delete, reorder, summarize, or reconstruct TOC/chapters.
Your plan is advisory evidence for later bounded cleanup operations; it must not itself remove text.
Find document-specific noise and reader-facing cleanup patterns from the full raw translated Markdown.
Return fields repeated_noise_patterns, document_specific_running_headers, examples_do_not_delete, likely_heading_body_patterns, likely_fragmentation_patterns, and warnings.
Each list item should be short and evidence-oriented. If uncertain, add a warning instead of inventing a pattern.
